name: Underground Prototype Chamber
subtitle: Forge the impossible
introText: Welcome to Underground Prototype Chamber. Forge the impossible. This is where your journey continues.
completionText: You have mastered Underground Prototype Chamber. The Alloy you've gathered here will echo through every room that follows.
guideIntroLine: Deep underground. The prototypes here were never meant to see daylight.

transformationStages.description: The room at its peak. Underground Prototype Chamber evolves as you progress.

midSceneTwist.effectDescription: New mechanics unlock in Underground Prototype Chamber. Event rates increase.

roomLaw.name: Law of Duplication
roomLaw.mechanic: Upgrades have a chance to apply twice, doubling their effect

landmark.name: The Prototype Forge
landmark.description: A rough workbench that evolves into a fabrication array
evolutionStages: A splintered workbench covered in failed experiments
Tools organize themselves and the first prototype succeeds
Automated arms assist in rapid prototyping cycles
A fabrication array prints blueprints into physical form
The Prototype Forge manifests ideas directly from thought

hazard.name: Blueprint Corruption
hazard.description: Rapid prototyping can corrupt blueprint quality
hazard.triggerCondition: Prototype speed exceeds quality assurance capacity
hazard.penalty: Corrupted blueprints produce defective outputs for a time

stabilizer.name: Quality Check
stabilizer.mechanic: Initiating quality verification between prototypes prevents corruption buildup

completionCeremony: The perfect prototype assembles itself from pure blueprint data
